NotepadPlus.UserLang: 0 1 2 <Keywords name="Keywords" content="let func return if else while for in break continue true false null import from class new this extends super try catch finally throw async await match type interface <Keywords name="Built-in Functions" content="print input type_of str int float len push pop sort reverse unique flatten range zip keys values entries map filter reduce read_file write_file json_parse json_stringify http_get http_post sqrt pow abs floor ceil round min max random now timestamp exec_command sleep assert exists <Keywords name="Operators" content="= + - * / % ** == != > < >= <= && || ! & | ^ ~ << >> >>>
